ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "item_number" TEXT /* Item number of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "vessel_length" TEXT /* Length of the vessel (e.g., Single Length, Double Length) */,
  "micron_size" INTEGER /* Micron size of the product (e.g., 150, 400) */,
  "bag_cartridge_style" TEXT /* Style of the bag or cartridge (e.g., NYLON MONOFILAMENT MESH FILTER BAGS – SEWN & PP RING) */,
  "cad_bim" REAL /* CAD/BIM files associated with the product */,
  "available" TEXT /* Availability of the product (e.g., Add to Cart) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category to which the product belongs */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used in the product */,
  "max_pressure" REAL /* Maximum pressure the product can handle */,
  "max_temperature" REAL /* Maximum temperature the product can withstand */,
  "min_temperature" REAL /* Minimum temperature the product can withstand */,
  "diameter" REAL /* Diameter of the product */,
  "length" TEXT /* Length of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "pdf_url" TEXT /* URL of the product's PDF datasheet */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was added to the catalog */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Mesh Filter Bags, Cartridges) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the category image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product in the order */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the product */,
  "tax" REAL /* Tax amount for the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer's company */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the product in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Level at which a reorder should be initiated */,
  "last_reorder_date" TEXT /* Date of the last reorder */,
  "last_stock_check_date" TEXT /* Date of the last stock check */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the inventory record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the inventory record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales representative, customer, administrator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
